scripts.build: CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.15 cargo tauri build && codesign --force --sign - --identifier com.whisper.dev src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/whisper.app
scripts.release: pnpm build && gh release delete v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --yes 2>/dev/null; gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/whisper_$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")_aarch64.dmg --title "whisper v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" --generate-notes
